title: Pithecellobium cateniforme
taxonomy: Pithecellobium cateniforme is classified as a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. This classification places it within the subfamily Caesalpinioideae and the tribe Caesalpinieae. It is native to Central and South America, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same region. As a member of the Fabaceae family, Pithecellobium cateniforme is closely related to other legumes, such as beans and peas. The classification of this plant is significant for understanding its ecological and economic importance.
